name: BOB Tools Plugins
description: Official plugins for BOB Tools — AI-powered forms, data management, currency rates, and phone control

plugins.name: bob-tools
plugins.description: Manage files, records, fields, views, dashboards, shares, integrations, and Telegram chats via BOB Tools MCP server. Supports 70+ tools for full data management.

plugins.name: bob-currency
plugins.description: Access current and historical currency exchange rates for 178+ currencies. No authentication required.

plugins.name: bob-control
plugins.description: Remote phone control via cloud relay — screenshots, UI tree, tap, swipe, type, app management, notifications. Requires BOB Control Android app.
